title: Parthenon
description: Unified observability dashboard for the Parthenon platform.

panels.title: Platform Status
panels.description: Overall platform health based on running container count

panels.title: Containers Up
panels.description: Number of Parthenon containers currently reporting metrics

panels.title: Host CPU
panels.description: Host CPU utilization percentage

panels.title: Host Memory
panels.description: Host memory utilization percentage

panels.title: Host Disk
panels.description: Root filesystem usage percentage

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Log lines matching error patterns across all containers

panels.title: Container Health Timeline
panels.description: Running state of all Parthenon containers over time

panels.title: OOM Events (24h)
panels.description: Out-of-memory events per container in the last 24 hours

panels.title: Container Details
panels.description: Resource usage per container — CPU, memory, and network

panels.title: CPU Utilization
panels.description: Host CPU busy percentage (100% - idle)

panels.title: CPU Load (Saturation)
panels.description: System load average — values above CPU count indicate saturation

panels.title: Memory Utilization
panels.description: Host memory usage excluding caches and buffers

panels.title: Memory Swap
panels.description: Swap space in use — any swap usage indicates memory pressure

panels.title: Disk Usage
panels.description: Filesystem usage per mount point

panels.title: Disk I/O
panels.description: Disk read and write throughput

panels.title: Network Traffic
panels.description: Host network receive and transmit throughput

panels.title: Network Errors
panels.description: Network interface errors — any value above 0 needs investigation

panels.title: CPU by Container
panels.description: Container CPU usage ranked highest to lowest

panels.title: Memory by Container
panels.description: Container memory usage ranked highest to lowest

panels.title: Network by Container
panels.description: Per-container network throughput (RX and TX)

panels.title: Log Volume by Level
panels.description: Log line count over time, stacked by severity level. Requires Loki automatic level detection (detected_level label).

panels.title: Log Volume by Container
panels.description: Log line count over time, stacked by container

panels.title: Error Rate Trend
panels.description: Error log lines per second over time

panels.title: Log Level Distribution
panels.description: Proportional breakdown of log levels. Requires Loki automatic level detection (detected_level label).

panels.title: Log Throughput
panels.description: Total log lines per second across all containers

panels.title: Top Error Services
panels.description: Containers producing the most error logs

panels.title: Top Error Patterns
panels.description: Most frequent error-producing containers

panels.title: Log Stream
panels.description: Live log stream filtered by container, level, and search text
